catering.title: Catering · The Grinders Sub Platter
catering.headline: Feeds 8–10 People
catering.description: 16 generous servings. Pick a variety of our delicious cold grinders — turkey, roast beef, ham, tuna, BLT, or classic Italian. Customize your platter today!

headerExtras.line2: Add Double Meat for $5 · Get It Hot N' Toasted!
